games.name: Dead Man's Tide
games.visual_world: Pirate world — stormy open seas, weathered galleons cutting through crashing waves, salt-crusted docks wrapped in sea fog, barnacle-covered hulls, flickering lanterns on creaking ships, treasure maps, rope ladders, dramatic ocean horizons under dark rolling clouds. Gritty, dangerous, and alive.

games.name: Ashen Kingdom
games.visual_world: Dark fantasy realm — crumbling stone kingdoms buried under ash, smoldering ruins glowing with dying embers, skeletal forests, armored figures silhouetted against a blood-red sky, cursed landscapes, ancient battlefields, ember-lit darkness. Grim, atmospheric, and foreboding.

art_rotation.style: Cosmic lo-fi, not space opera — avoid photorealistic space photography, starfield/nebula/ringed-planet stock imagery, spaceships, space stations, or any busy sci-fi scene. Soft matte painterly digital illustration with fine film grain, no readable text, no intricate small-scale detail. Meditative and ancient — the feeling of held breath, not spectacle.

registers.name: Monolith
registers.prompt: A single ancient stone structure etched with faint glowing glyphs, standing alone in an empty dark void, lit by one distant point of light. Heavy negative space, restrained and quiet — wide shot or extreme close-up on the etched texture.

registers.name: Energy
registers.prompt: Fully abstract cosmic force — threads of light slowly converging toward, or radiating from, a single point of stillness. Topographic and painterly rather than illustrative, heavy negative space in the outer frame.

registers.name: Sigil
registers.prompt: A single glowing geometric sigil hovering in near-total darkness. Minimal, meditative composition with vast negative space, extreme close-up on the mark itself.

entities.name: Void
entities.color: near-black violet, the glow barely visible

games.name: High Noon Saloon
games.visual_world: Wild West frontier — sun-scorched desert under a blazing noon sun, dusty saloon interiors with whiskey glasses and wanted posters, a lone gunslinger standing in cracked earth, tumbleweeds drifting past weathered wooden storefronts, long shadows at high noon. Tense and cinematic.
